retry_reason: Not a wrapper; failure paths are due to missing firmware or invalid type, which are not transient.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to retrieve firmware information (address, size, version) from AMD GPU device structures and optionally load SMU firmware. It does not focus on reference-count management; any refcount effects are secondary side effects of firmware loading, not the core purpose.
